title: AI Engineer
description: Optimized document analysis by fine-tuning SLMs, cutting PoC latency from 2 minutes to 40 seconds. Built a Hybrid RAG stack with Azure AI Search + reranking to reduce analysis time by 65%. Implemented AI governance guardrails for deterministic security and shipped CV-based signature verification with PyTorch/YOLO/SAM3 to enable claims automation.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Architected lending infrastructure using DDD + state machines for full financial lifecycle traceability and strong data integrity. Built hybrid RBAC/PBAC with atomic transactions and automated TDD suites to keep reliability high and coverage above 95%. Optimized CI/CD with Turborepo + remote caching, reducing build-to-deploy time by 87% (41m → <5m).

title: Team Leader
description: Led my university team to secure 1st Runner-Up in the IoT Category at the 14th IT Skills Olympics, showcasing our innovative Smart Waste Management System that integrates real-time monitoring and efficient data handling to revolutionize waste collection processes.

title: Lead Software Engineer
description: Led end-to-end software + AI delivery for smart-city systems, from cost modeling to multi-node deployment. Built an autonomous Agentic Engine with custom MCP servers to expose IoT data for multi-model orchestration. Shipped Raspberry Pi/MQTT fleet management and CV-based QR verification, cutting module startup time by 90% and improving urban routing efficiency.

title: Participant
description: Solved 3 out of 4 problem sets in my university Java programming contest during the first year.

title: Contributor & Maintainer
description: Contributed to MCP specifications in the LangChain ecosystem, defining HTTP transport for server-side weather integrations. Engineered URL-persisted state using nuqs for strict client-backend sync in search systems. Built TypeScript utility layers to standardize data transformation and reduce technical debt. Resolved geospatial library conflicts and authored technical documentation for AI orchestration frameworks.

title: Student
